question: In which state is the Channel district?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?agencyName ?distributionRegion ?show ?showCount
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Ministry_of_Information_and_Communication_Technology_(Thailand)>
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/agencyName>  ?agencyName .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Channel_9_MCOT_HD>
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/distributor>  ?distributionRegion .
    ?channel1  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/predecessor>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Comedy_Channel_(United_States)> .
    ?show     <http://dbpedia.org/property/distributor>  ?channel1 ;
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/TelevisionShow>
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?show2) AS ?showCount)
      WHERE
        { ?channel2  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/predecessor>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Comedy_Channel_(United_States)> .
          ?show2    <http://dbpedia.org/property/network>  ?channel2 ;
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/TelevisionShow>
        }
    }
  }
LIMIT   1

question: How many cities are around the sea in which the the fig tree bay meets?

PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>

SELECT DISTINCT  (COUNT(?uri))
WHERE
  {   { ?sea  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/inflow>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Atlantic_Ocean> }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Ionian_Sea>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/outflow>  ?sea
      }

      { BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/American_Mediterranean_Sea> AS ?sea) }
    ?sea  <http://dbpedia.org/property/cities>  ?uri .
    ?uri  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/City>
  }

question: Who are the characters of Batman Live?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?answer
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { "Did chris lebenzon edit Batman returns?" "Who is the developer of the software which distributes Batman: Arkham City Lockdown ?" "Who are the cast members of The Simpsons Ride?" }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "Did chris lebenzon edit Batman returns?" ), EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Batman_Returns>
                                                                                          <http://dbpedia.org/property/editing>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Chris_Lebenzon>
                                                                              }, if(( ?question = "Who is the developer of the software which distributes Batman: Arkham City Lockdown ?" ), EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Batman:_Arkham_City_Lockdown>
                                                                                                                                                                                                                <http://dbpedia.org/property/distributor>  ?d .
                                                                                                                                                                                                      ?d        <http://dbpedia.org/property/developer>  ?answer ;
                                                                                                                                                                                                                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Software>
                                                                                                                                                                                                    }, EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Simpsons_Ride>
                                                                                                                                                                                                                          <http://dbpedia.org/property/starring>  ?answer
                                                                                                                                                                                                              })) AS ?exists)
    FILTER ( ?exists )
  }

question: Which artists trained in San Francisco Art Institute?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?artist1) AS ?countArtists) ?artist2 ?commonSchool
WHERE
  {   { ?artist1  <http://dbpedia.org/property/training>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/San_Francisco_Art_Institute> ;
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Artist>
      }
    UNION
      { ?artist2  <http://dbpedia.org/property/training>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/José_Ruiz_y_Blasco> ;
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Artist>
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Jack_McGregor>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/education>  ?commonSchool .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/William_Anthony_(artist)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/training>  ?commonSchool
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?artist2 ?commonSchool
ORDER BY ?artist2 ?commonSchool
LIMIT   100

question: How many things are written in C++?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?software) AS ?totalCount)
WHERE
  {   { ?software  <http://dbpedia.org/property/programmingLanguage>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/C++> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/operatingSystem>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Microsoft_Windows>
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?software
        WHERE
          { FILTER ( ?software = <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Microsoft_Office> )
            FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Microsoft_Office>
                                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/programmingLanguage>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/C++>
                          }
          }
      }
    UNION
      { ?software  <http://dbpedia.org/property/genre>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Science_fiction> }
  }

        WHERE

    UNION

        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>

        WHERE

                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/architect>  ?architectPittsburgh ;

question: How many TV shows are similar to the ones belonging to fantasy genre?

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer

  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nonFictionSubject>  ?subject
          }
      }
    UNION

        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

        WHERE
          { ?x    <http://dbpedia.org/property/producer>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Susie_Liggat> .
            ?uri  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/related>  ?x ;
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/TelevisionShow>

        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

question: How many developers were involved in creating games whose score is composed by Gerard Marino?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?game) AS ?countHirokazu)
      WHERE
        { ?game  <http://dbpedia.org/property/composer>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hirokazu_Tanaka> ;
                 rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/VideoGame>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?themeMusic) AS ?countJulian)
      WHERE
        { ?themeMusic  <http://dbpedia.org/property/themeMusicComposer>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Julian_Gingell> }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?creator
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Theme_Time_Radio_Hour>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/property/creator>  ?creator .
          <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Times_They_Are_a-Changin'_(musical)>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/musicBy>  ?creator
        }
    }
    BIND(ucase(str(?countHirokazu)) AS ?countHirokazuStr)
    BIND(ucase(str(?countJulian)) AS ?countJulianStr)
    BIND(str(?creator) AS ?creatorStr)
    BIND(concat("Hirokazu Tanaka Video Games Count: ", ?countHirokazuStr, "; Julian Gingell Theme Music Count: ", ?countJulianStr, "; Creator also music composer: ", ?creatorStr) AS ?answer)
  }

question: Who composed the music for Tonight's the Night ?

SELECT DISTINCT  ?result
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tonight's_the_Night_(2003_musical)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/music>  ?result .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Alana_Stewart>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/spouse>  ?result
      }

      { BIND(EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Early_in_the_Morning_and_Late_at_Night>
                                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/musicalArtist>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Hank_Williams_Jr.>

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/musicalBand>  ?result .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tonight's_the_Night_(Blackstreet_song)>

question: Whose mayors are affiliated with Christen-Democratisch en Vlaams?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?neighbor
WHERE
  { VALUES ( ?city ?mayorName ) {
      ( <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Geneva> "Esther Alder" )
      ( <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Venice> "Luigi Brugnaro" )
    }
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?city
        WHERE
          { ?city   <http://dbpedia.org/property/mayor>  ?mayor .
            ?mayor  rdfs:label            ?label
            FILTER ( lcase(str(?label)) = lcase(?mayorName) )
            FILTER ( ( ?city = <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Geneva> ) || ( ?city = <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Venice> ) )
          }
      }
    UNION
      { ?neighbor  <http://dbpedia.org/property/neighboringMunicipalities>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Cologny> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/mayor>  ?mayorNeighbor .
        ?mayorNeighbor
                  rdfs:label            ?labelNeighbor
        FILTER ( lcase(str(?labelNeighbor)) = "esther alder" )
      }
  }

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?person
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/placeOfBurial>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Rome> ;
                     rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Royalty>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?person
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/placeOfBurial>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Rome> ;
                     <http://dbpedia.org/property/placeOfBurial>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mausoleum_of_Augustus>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?person
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/placeOfBurial>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mausoleum_of_Augustus> }
      }
  }

PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?x  <http://dbpedia.org/property/destinations>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mediterranean_Sea> ;
        <http://dbpedia.org/property/destinations>  ?uri ;
        rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Airline>
    FILTER ( ?uri != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mediterranean_Sea> )
  }

question: Which cloud platform of Google cloud connect also provides services to 21Vianet ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?serviceCount ?gamePlatform ?commonProvider
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?service) AS ?serviceCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/21Vianet>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/property/services>  ?service
        }
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Google_Cloud_Connect>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/computingPlatform>  ?gamePlatform
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Microsoft_Office_Picture_Manager>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/license>  ?commonProvider .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Google_Cloud_Connect>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/computingPlatform>  ?commonProvider
      }
  }

question: Count the number of families of the Animal kingdom.
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?species) AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?x        <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/kingdom>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Animal> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/species>  ?species .
            ?species  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Species>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?family
        WHERE
          { ?x  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/kingdom>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Animal> ;
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/family>  ?family ;
                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Mammal>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?mammal) AS ?countCanidae)
        WHERE
          { ?mammal  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/family>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Canidae> ;
                     rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Mammal>
          }
      }
  }

question: Who is the head coach of the teams in Middlesbrough FC?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?coach2009_10 ?coach2006_07 ?headCoachCount
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/2009–10_Middlesbrough_F.C._season>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/manager>  ?coach2009_10 .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/2006–07_Middlesbrough_F.C._season>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/manager>  ?coach2006_07 .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/England_national_under-21_football_team>
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/coach>  ?coach2006_07
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?coach) AS ?headCoachCount)
      WHERE
        { ?season  <http://dbpedia.org/property/club>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Middlesbrough_F.C.> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/manager>  ?coach .
          ?coach   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
        }
    }
  }
LIMIT   1

        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

            ?musician  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/instrument>  ?instrument ;

LIMIT   100

question: What is the number of occupation of the people who died in tampa bay, florida?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?deathCauseJohn ?deathCauseMartino (COUNT(?knownFor) AS ?knownForCount) ?office
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/John_Thomson_Mason_(1787–1850)>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/deathCause>  ?deathCauseJohn .
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Martino_Martini>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/deathCause>  ?deathCauseMartino
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?knownFor
      WHERE
        { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/deathPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Saint_Petersburg> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/knownFor>  ?knownFor
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?office
      WHERE
        { ?person2  <http://dbpedia.org/property/deathPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/U.S._Route_165> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/property/office>  ?office ;
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
        }
    }
  }
GROUP BY ?deathCauseJohn ?deathCauseMartino ?office

question: Who is the writer of mark twain Tonight ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?answer
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { "Was Mark Twain a character of Mark Twain Tonight?" "Was the cover of The adventures of Tom Sawyer designed by Mark Twain?" "Name the musician who gave the music in Tonight's the night and is also wedded to Alana Stewart ?" }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "Was Mark Twain a character of Mark Twain Tonight?" ), EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mark_Twain_Tonight>

                                                                                                                                                                                                          <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/coverArtist>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mark_Twain>
                                                                                                                                                                                              }, if(( ?question = "Name the musician who gave the music in Tonight's the night and is also wedded to Alana Stewart ?" ), str(?musician), "Unknown"))) AS ?answer)
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tonight's_the_Night_(2003_musical)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/music>  ?musician .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Alana_Stewart>

  }

question: How many rivers start in an English speaking country?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?river ; separator=', ') AS ?rivers) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?countryCaspian) AS ?numCountriesCaspian) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?riverIndianOcean) AS ?numRiversIndianOcean)
WHERE
  {   { ?countryEnglish
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/officialLanguage>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/English_language> .
        ?river    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/sourceCountry>  ?countryEnglish ;
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/River>
      }
    UNION
      { ?riverCaspian
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/riverMouth>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Caspian_Sea> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/sourceCountry>  ?countryCaspian .
        ?countryCaspian
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country>
      }
    UNION
      { ?riverIndianOcean
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/riverMouth>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Indian_Ocean> ;
                  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/River>
      }
  }

question: In which countries is coconut used as a food ingredient?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?count_nations) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?otherIngredient) AS ?count_other_ingredients) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?ingredientInSweden) AS ?count_ingredients_sweden)
WHERE
  { ?food1    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ingredient>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Coconut> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/country>  ?country .
    ?country  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Country> .
    ?food2    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ingredient>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Potato> ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ingredient>  ?otherIngredient
    FILTER ( ?otherIngredient != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Potato> )
    ?food3  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Sweden> ;
            <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/ingredient>  ?ingredientInSweden
  }

question: In which places do companies founded in Newcastle operate?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?place) AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?company  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundationPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Newcastle_upon_Tyne> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/regionServed>  ?place .
            ?place    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Place>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?companyName ; separator=', ') AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?company  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Company> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundationPlace>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_States> ;
                      rdfs:label            ?companyName
            FILTER ( lang(?companyName) = "en" )
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?personName ; separator=', ') AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?company  <http://dbpedia.org/property/foundation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/New_York_City> .
            ?person   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/board>  ?company ;
                      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person> ;
                      rdfs:label            ?personName
            FILTER ( lang(?personName) = "en" )
          }
      }
  }

question: Who all have been presenters on shows by the NBC?
Give me the list of cars which are the predecessor of Full Sized Cars?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?predecessor) AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Pontiac_G8>
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/relatedMeanOfTransportation>  ?car1 .
            ?car1     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/predecessor>  ?predecessor ;
                      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Automobile>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT str(?predecessor_car) ; separator=', ') AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?car2  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/automobilePlatform>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/GM_B_platform> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/predecessor>  ?predecessor_car ;
                   rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Automobile>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT str(?predecessor_auto) ; separator=', ') AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Cadillac_Fleetwood>
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/related>  ?auto .
            ?auto     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/predecessor>  ?predecessor_auto ;
                      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Automobile>
          }
      }
  }
LIMIT   1

question: From where does the river Upper Neretva start flowing?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?mouthCountry ?countCountries ?firstAiredCountry
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Upper_Neretva>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/mouthCountry>  ?mouthCountry ;
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/riverMouth>  ?sea .
    ?sea      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Sea>
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?countCountries)
      WHERE
        { ?sea  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/country>  ?country }
    }
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Gümüş_(TV_series)>
              <http://dbpedia.org/property/firstAired>  ?firstAiredCountry
    FILTER ( ?firstAiredCountry = ?mouthCountry )
  }

question: Count all the stateless people
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { ?uri  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/citizenship>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Statelessness> ;
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Scientist>
      }
    UNION
      { ?uri  <http://dbpedia.org/property/nationality>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Statelessness> ;
              rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Writer>
      }
    UNION

        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(?office) AS ?countOffices)
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/allegiance>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Union_(American_Civil_War)> ;
                     <http://dbpedia.org/property/office>  ?office
          }

question: Count the number of battles fought by the military person involved in Morocco ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?result
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?battle1) AS ?result)
        WHERE
          { ?militaryPerson1
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/battles>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Levant> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/battles>  ?battle1
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?battle2
        WHERE
          { ?militaryPerson2
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/battles>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Algeria> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/battles>  ?battle2 ;
                      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/MilitaryPerson>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?conflict) AS ?result)
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/battle>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Afghanistan> ;
                     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/battle>  ?conflict
          }
      }
  }

SELECT DISTINCT  ?countShow ?producer ?notableWork
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?show) AS ?countShow)
      WHERE
        { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Russell_T_Davies>
                    <http://dbpedia.org/property/notableworks>  ?show .

                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/producer>  ?producer .

question: Name all the products produced by the producer of United States dollar ?
What is the launch site of Aquarius (rocket) ?
What are the players whose former teams are Carolina Panthers and Indianapolis Colts?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?player ?count ?americanFootballPlayer
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?player
        WHERE
          { ?player  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Indianapolis_Colts> ;
                     <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Carolina_Panthers>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?player2) AS ?count)
        WHERE
          { ?player2  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Indianapolis_Colts> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Carolina_Panthers>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?americanFootballPlayer
        WHERE
          { ?americanFootballPlayer
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Indianapolis_Colts> ;
                      <http://dbpedia.org/property/currentteam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Michigan_Wolverines> ;
                      rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/AmericanFootballPlayer>
          }
      }
  }

question: Which serving railway line of the Daund Junction railway station is the home port of INS Viraat ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?homeport ?manages ?servingLine
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/INS_Viraat_(R22)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/homeport>  ?homeport
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mumbai>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/manages>  ?line .
                        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Daund_Junction_railway_station>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/servingRailwayLine>  ?line
                      }
        BIND(true AS ?manages)
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Daund_Junction_railway_station>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/servingRailwayLine>  ?servingLine
      }
  }
LIMIT   1

question: Name all those buried in a place governed by a city council.

SELECT DISTINCT  ?person
WHERE
  {   { ?place   <http://dbpedia.org/property/governingBody>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_States_Department_of_the_Interior> .
        ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/restingplace>  ?place ;
                 rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>

      { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/placeOfBurial>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Arlington_National_Cemetery> ;
                 rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Person>
      }

      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

question: How many fictional characters were humans?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?answer
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?char1) AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?char1  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/creator>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Greg_Daniels> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/series>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Office_(U.S._TV_series)> ;
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/FictionalCharacter>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?char2
        WHERE
          { ?char2  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/relative>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Uncle_Henry_(Oz)> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/species>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Human> ;
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/FictionalCharacter>
          }
        LIMIT   1
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?char3) AS ?answer)
        WHERE
          { ?play  <http://dbpedia.org/property/characters>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Catwoman> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/property/characters>  ?char3
          }
      }
  }

question: Count the affiliations of International Union of Anarchists?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?query ?count
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ("Estimate the number of sports divisions at the universities under international association of universities." AS ?query) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?sport) AS ?count)
        WHERE
          { ?univ  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/affiliation>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/International_Association_of_Universities> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/sport>  ?sport
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ("Count the number of offices held by people who have their allegiances with the american civil war union?" AS ?query) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?office) AS ?count)
        WHERE
          { ?person  <http://dbpedia.org/property/allegiance>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Union_(American_Civil_War)> ;
                     <http://dbpedia.org/property/office>  ?office
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ("Who is the founder of the trade union with whom Amalgamated Clothing Workers of America is affiliated?" AS ?query) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
        WHERE
          { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Amalgamated_Clothing_Workers_of_America>
                      <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/affiliation>  ?union .
            ?union    <http://dbpedia.org/property/founded>  ?founder
          }
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?query

question: Count the water bodies that flow into the North Sea?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?result
WHERE
  {   { ?result  <http://dbpedia.org/property/inflow>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/North_Sea> }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?city) AS ?result)
        WHERE
          { ?sea   <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/inflow>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Atlantic_Ocean> ;
                   <http://dbpedia.org/property/cities>  ?city .
            ?city  rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/City>
          }
      }
    UNION
      { ?result  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/riverMouth>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/North_Sea> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/riverMouth>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Thames_Estuary> ;

question: How many cities are close to Lake Victoria?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?nearestCityToLakeVictoria ?countOtherNearestCountries ?nearestCityToHistoricPlaces
WHERE
  { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Lake_Victoria>
              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nearestCity>  ?nearestCityToLakeVictoria
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?otherCountry) AS ?countOtherNearestCountries)
      WHERE
        { ?lake  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nearestCountry>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Uganda> ;
                 <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nearestCountry>  ?otherCountry
          FILTER ( ?otherCountry != <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Uganda> )
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?nearestCityToHistoricPlaces
      WHERE
        { ?historicPlace
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nearestCity>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Wisconsin> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/nearestCity>  ?nearestCityToHistoricPlaces ;
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/HistoricPlace>
        }
    }
  }
LIMIT   10

question: What genre's softwares are released with a GNU GPL license?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question (COUNT(DISTINCT ?software) AS ?count)
WHERE
  {   { BIND("How many different kinds of softwares have been released under the GPL license?" AS ?question)
        ?software  <http://dbpedia.org/property/license>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/GNU_General_Public_License> ;
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/genre>  ?genre
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("Does GeneWeb have the GPL license?" AS ?question)
        FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/GeneWeb>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/license>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/GNU_General_Public_License>
                      }
        BIND(iri("http://dbpedia.org/resource/GeneWeb") AS ?software)
      }
    UNION
      { BIND("Is Darcs released with a GNU license?" AS ?question)
        FILTER EXISTS { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Darcs>
                                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/license>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/GNU>
                      }
        BIND(iri("http://dbpedia.org/resource/Darcs") AS ?software)
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?question

PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Isa_(name)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/meaning>  ?uri .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Sacred_Heart_Convent_School_(Bangkok)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/type>  ?uri
      }
    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Isa_(name)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/meaning>  ?uri .
        <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Prodigal_Son_(play)>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/property/subject>  ?uri
      }
  }

question: Who is  venerated in  Judaism and Islam?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?venerated_in_both) AS ?count_both) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?venerated_in_islam) AS ?count_islam) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?saints_in_judaism) AS ?count_saints_judaism)
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?venerated_in_both
      WHERE
        { ?venerated_in_both
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/veneratedIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Islam> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/veneratedIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Judaism>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?venerated_in_islam
      WHERE
        { ?venerated_in_islam
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/veneratedIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Islam>
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?saints_in_judaism
      WHERE
        { ?saints_in_judaism
                    rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Saint> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/veneratedIn>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Judaism>
        }
    }
  }

question: Count the number teams which have  former ice hockey players which also included American Hockey League ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?team) AS ?numTeams) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?playerFormerTeams) AS ?numPlayersWithBothFormerTeams) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?playerCoached) AS ?numPlayersCoachedByTortorella)
WHERE
  { { ?team     <http://dbpedia.org/property/league>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/National_Hockey_League> .
      ?playerTeam  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/team>  ?team ;
                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Player>
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT DISTINCT  ?playerFormerTeams
      WHERE
        { ?playerFormerTeams
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Indianapolis_Colts> ;
                    <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/formerTeam>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Carolina_Panthers>
        }
    }
    { ?teamJohnTortorella
                <http://dbpedia.org/property/headCoach>  <http://dbpedia.org/resource/John_Tortorella> .
      ?playerCoached
                <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/team>  ?teamJohnTortorella ;
                rdf:type              <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/IceHockeyPlayer>
    }
  }

question: Name the office of Richard Coke ?

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/William_Luther_Hill>
                  <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/profession>  ?uri

    UNION
      { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Richard_Coke>
